articles.title: Amritsar: Commuters Shield Faces Amid Heatwave #Gallery - Social News XYZ
articles.search_term: heatwave (Amritsar OR Barnala OR Bathinda OR Faridkot OR "Fatehgarh Sahib" OR Fazilka OR Ferozepur OR Gurdaspur OR Hoshiarpur OR Jalandhar OR Kapurthala OR Ludhiana OR Mansa OR Moga OR Muktsar OR "Nawanshahr (Shahid Bhagat Singh Nagar)" OR Pathankot OR Patiala OR Rupnagar OR "Sahibzada Ajit Singh Nagar (Mohali)" OR Sangrur OR "Tarn Taran") Punjab
articles.full_text:
Amritsar: A commuter covers her face with cloth to protect herself from scorching heat while travelling along a road in Amritsar on Sunday, April 26, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
Amritsar: A motorcyclist covers his face with cloth to shield himself from the heat while travelling along a road on a hot summer afternoon in Amritsar on Sunday, April 26, 2026. (Photo: IANS)
